case_title: AMERICAN AIR TESTING VS. CATHLEEN GOUVEIA

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED RECEIVED VIA MAIL - FILED BY DEFENDANT GOUVEIA, CATHLEEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LAURA--CEO, DAVE ANDREWS, MICHELLE RIERA--EMPLOYEE,JOHN R. RIERA--OWNER. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN AIR TESTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOUVEIA, CATHLEEN $3,845.00 PRINCIPAL, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.00, DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
